module_role: Module 7 of v17 integration — full integration runner. Wires M1 (settlement registry), M2 (CI constants), M3 (mass-battle resolution), M4 (UnitRoster), M5 (settlement-territory aggregation), and M6 (faction actions) into a runnable simulation extending mc_v15. Adds m7_resolution_hooks for the 6 tactic cards deferred from M3/M6. Includes m7_balance_sweep for N=1000 Wilson 95% CI verification per integration_plan §5 Phase 2d.

entries.value: {attacker_faction, defender_faction, attacker_units, defender_units, attacker_mil, defender_mil, attacker_card, defender_card, fort_level, rng, attacker_pool_delta, defender_pool_delta, suppress_route_for_attacker, suppress_route_for_defender, pursuit_blocked, withdrawal_no_penalty, stratagem_used, hooks_fired}
entries.quoted_text: Outputs: BattleResult(winner, attacker_losses, defender_losses, territory_transferred, accord_outcome, stability_triggers)
entries.assumption: M7_ASSUMPTION_ONE: ResolutionContext wraps M3 resolve_battle inputs + intermediate state for hooks; HookedBattleResult extends BattleResult with pursuit_blocked, withdrawal_no_penalty, hooks_fired.

entries.value: Pre-tactic-resolution: read opponent's card from context, optionally swap own card to varfell_revised_card param, set stratagem_used=True
entries.quoted_text: At Phase 1 tactic-card resolution, the Varfell general's read of the battlefield triggers first: opposing tactic card is revealed face-up to Varfell. Varfell may then revise their own tactic card from hand once before both reveal simultaneously and resolve normally. Mechanically this is an initiative inversion at the tactic-card layer.

entries.value: Sets suppress_route_for_attacker or suppress_route_for_defender = True; route checks for that side bypassed
entries.quoted_text: Crusade Fervour (Brutal + Discipline check exempt this turn)
Inquisitor's Mark (target unit -2D, any opponent)
entries.assumption: M7_ASSUMPTION_THREE: aggregate-count approximation — canon 'target unit -2D' is per-unit; M4's aggregate-count schema cannot express per-unit modifiers, so M7 applies as -2 opponent pool.

entries.value: Sets withdrawal_no_penalty=True; construct_withdrawal_result returns outcome='withdrawal' with no losses, no territory transfer, no Stability penalty
entries.quoted_text: Calculated Retreat (withdraw without Overextended penalty)

entries.value: Sets withdrawal_no_penalty=True AND pursuit_blocked=True (extends Calculated Retreat with pursuit-block)
entries.quoted_text: Disappear (withdraw all units; opponent cannot pursue this season)
Ducal Call (summon 1 unit from adjacent territory)
entries.assumption: M7_ASSUMPTION_FOUR: caller specifies which class to summon; default Levy per MUSTER_DEFAULT_CLASS. Pre-resolution state mutation on attacker_units or defender_units.

entries.section: M7 architecture (derived per integration_plan §5 Phase 2); M7_ASSUMPTION_FIVE hook firing order
entries.quoted_text: Pre-resolution hooks fire in known order: stratagem (revise card before tactic apply), ducal_call (mutate unit roster before pool compute), crusade_fervour (flag for later route suppression), inquisitors_mark (apply pool delta), calculated_retreat + disappear (set withdrawal flag for short-circuit).
entries.assumption: M7_ASSUMPTION_FIVE: hook firing order — stratagem and ducal_call before pool compute; inquisitors_mark applied as pool delta; calculated_retreat and disappear short-circuit before M3 normal resolution path.

entries.quoted_text: Calculated Retreat (withdraw without Overextended penalty); Disappear (withdraw all units; opponent cannot pursue this season)

entries.section: §5 Phase 2c — Unit-token state in Workstream A
entries.quoted_text: Add to mc_v16.py → mc_v17.py: self.units = defaultdict(lambda: defaultdict(int)). Schema-complete (9 classes per mass_battle §B.2), semantics-partial (3 initially). Active classes: 'Levy', 'LightInf', 'HeavyInf'.

entries.value: 4 shared + 2 faction-specific tactic cards per mass_battle §B.4
entries.quoted_text: Each faction receives a hand of 6 tactic cards at game start (4 shared + 2 faction-specific). Cards refresh each season.

entries.value: Crown=[shared4 + royal_guard + ducal_call]; Church=[shared4 + crusade_fervour + inquisitors_mark]; Hafenmark=[shared4 + mercenary_surge + sovereign_authority]; Varfell=[shared4 + stratagem + calculated_retreat]
entries.quoted_text: Crown | Royal Guard ... Ducal Call; Church | Crusade Fervour ... Inquisitor's Mark; Hafenmark | Mercenary Surge ... Sovereign Authority; Varfell | Stratagem ... Calculated Retreat
Replace v17 territory state initialization with settlement-aggregate from M1 REGISTRY
Define settlement → territory aggregation: settlement state → per-territory Accord/PT/infrastructure

entries.value: Per Church-controlled territory +2 + Cathedral +1 + Inquisitor +1; clamped by M2.CI_SEASONAL_CAP_MAGNITUDE
entries.quoted_text: v17 territory state initialization with settlement-aggregate from M1 REGISTRY. Caps from M2.
PROP-07 | Victory threshold 11/15 | convergence §5.1 | victory_v30.md §0 + peninsular_strain_v30.md §6.1 | Replace 15/15 throughout
DEFAULT_PARAMS = {'CAMPAIGN_SEASONS': 50, ...}

entries.section: Standard Wilson score CI formula (1927); referenced from integration_plan §5 Phase 2d; Wilson score interval — standard formula
entries.quoted_text: Standard normal 0.975 quantile = 1.96 for 95% two-sided CI.
Wilson CI check: all factions [20%, 30%] at 95%

entries.value: ACTION_REGISTRY dict mapping action_id → callable(faction, target, world, rng, logger)
entries.section: M7 architecture (derived per integration_plan §5 Phase 2); M7_ASSUMPTION_TWO
entries.quoted_text: mc_v15's apply() is a 200-line if-chain. mc_v17 uses an ACTION_REGISTRY dict mapping action_id → ApplyFunc. M6's actions get their own apply functions; mc_v15's actions migrate with minimal changes.
entries.assumption: M7_ASSUMPTION_TWO: action dispatch via registry, not if-chain.

entries.value: 30% faction-unique action when favorable; 35% Conquest; 20% Muster; 15% Govern
entries.section: M7 architecture (derived per integration_plan §5 Phase 2); M7_ASSUMPTION_SIX faction_take_action
entries.quoted_text: Minimal AI policy probabilistic action mix. Designed to exercise the M-module surface evenly; not intended to model optimal faction play.
entries.assumption: M7_ASSUMPTION_SIX: minimal AI for sweep coverage. Not balanced or strategically optimal. Per integration_plan §5 Phase 2d the sweep tests integration correctness; faction-level strategic balance is downstream tuning.

entries.value: Attacker always plays standard_advance; defender plays disciplined_defence if garrisoned, else standard_advance
entries.section: M7 architecture (derived per integration_plan §5 Phase 2); M7_ASSUMPTION_SEVEN tactic card selection
entries.quoted_text: M7 wires the 20 cards but the AI does not yet learn which to play. Defaults exercise the shared 4 cards; faction-specific cards exercised only when explicitly invoked via test scaffolding.
entries.assumption: M7_ASSUMPTION_SEVEN: simple tactic card AI; not optimal. M7 hooks exercised via t2-t6 tests rather than AI selection.

entries.value: Crown 67.7%, Church 0.8%, Hafenmark 1.8%, Varfell 29.7% (5.7s runtime, 175 campaigns/sec)
entries.section: M7 sweep output per integration_plan §5 Phase 2d Wilson CI verification; v17_sweep_report.json
entries.quoted_text: Wilson 95% CI: Crown [64.74, 70.53], Church [0.41, 1.57], Hafenmark [1.14, 2.83], Varfell [26.95, 32.61]. Only Varfell's CI overlaps [20%, 30%] balance band. all_factions_in_band=False. battles_per_campaign=12.88, mean_season_ended=50.0.
entries.note: Per integration_plan §10 R-03 + Phase 2d: this is the expected sweep behavior — the harness CORRECTLY detects balance failure rather than papering over it. M7 deliverable is the runner + sweep + Wilson CI verification; fixing balance is downstream tuning work.

provisional_assumptions.decision: Hooks operate on a ResolutionContext dataclass wrapping M3 resolve_battle inputs + intermediate state. resolve_battle_hooked builds context, applies pre-resolution hooks, then runs M3-compatible resolution with hook-derived pool deltas. HookedBattleResult wraps M3.BattleResult with pursuit_blocked, withdrawal_no_penalty, hooks_fired.
provisional_assumptions.rationale: Keeps M3 primitives untouched (M3 doesn't import M7). M7 owns the orchestration layer. Withdrawal short-circuit cleanly skips M3's roll + outcome computation when Calculated Retreat / Disappear fires.
provisional_assumptions.follow_up: If more hooks need post-resolution mutation, extend ResolutionContext + apply_post_resolution_hooks. Currently no post-resolution hooks exist.

provisional_assumptions.decision: mc_v17 uses an ACTION_REGISTRY dict mapping action_id → callable. mc_v15's if-chain is replaced. M6's 9 actions registered as discrete entries (Crown Initiative modes as 3 separate entries).
provisional_assumptions.rationale: Cleaner than v15's 200-line if-chain. Allows easy extension by registering new callables without modifying the dispatch path.
provisional_assumptions.follow_up: Add remaining mc_v15 actions (Treaty, EA, Spy, etc.) to registry when those become M7 scope. Currently the integration test is for M-module wiring; non-M-module actions left to mc_v15 reference path or unimplemented.

provisional_assumptions.decision: Canon 'target unit -2D' is per-unit; M4's aggregate-count schema cannot express per-unit modifiers. M7 applies as -2 opponent pool delta (aggregate approximation).
provisional_assumptions.rationale: Preserves M4's aggregate-count semantics. Per-unit targeting would require expanding M4 to per-unit Health/Discipline tracking — out of scope.
provisional_assumptions.follow_up: If per-unit semantics become required (M8?), expand UnitRoster to track individual unit instances + Health/Discipline state per unit.

provisional_assumptions.decision: Pre-resolution state mutation: caller specifies adjacent_unit_class (default Levy per MUSTER_DEFAULT_CLASS) and adjacent_unit_count (default 1 per canon). Mutates attacker_units or defender_units dict before pool compute.
provisional_assumptions.rationale: Canon says 'summon 1 unit from adjacent territory'. Doesn't specify class. Levy default matches new-faction Muster behavior. Caller can override.
provisional_assumptions.follow_up: If canon specifies the summoned class, update default. Currently exercise via test scaffolding rather than AI dispatch (AI doesn't yet select tactic cards strategically).

provisional_assumptions.decision: Order: stratagem (revise card before tactic apply) → ducal_call (mutate roster before pool) → crusade_fervour (flag for route bypass) → inquisitors_mark (pool delta) → calculated_retreat → disappear (short-circuit to withdrawal). Only hooks for cards actually in play fire.
provisional_assumptions.rationale: Stratagem must happen first (it can change the card). Ducal Call's pre-resolution Muster must happen before pool compute. Crusade Fervour's flag must be set before M3 check_route runs. Withdrawal short-circuits must run last to override outcome.
provisional_assumptions.follow_up: If a new hook is added that depends on a different phase ordering, update HOOK_ORDER and document. Currently sufficient for the 6 deferred cards.

provisional_assumptions.decision: Probabilistic mix: 30% faction-unique action when favorable; 35% Conquest if adjacent hostile + Mil >= 3; 20% Muster; 15% Govern. Per-faction biases (Crown prefers Coronation Renewal when Excommunicated; Church prefers Excommunication on most-powerful rival).
provisional_assumptions.rationale: Designed to exercise M-module surface evenly across the sweep. Not intended as balanced or optimal play. Per integration_plan §5 Phase 2d the sweep tests integration correctness; faction-level strategic balance is downstream tuning.
provisional_assumptions.follow_up: Replace with v15's scoring-based AI when scope expands. Current sweep result (Crown 67.7%, Varfell 29.7%, Hafenmark 1.8%, Church 0.8%) reflects AI policy more than mechanic balance — fix AI before tuning mechanics.

provisional_assumptions.decision: Attacker always plays 'standard_advance'. Defender plays 'disciplined_defence' if garrisoned, else 'standard_advance'. Faction-specific cards exercised via test scaffolding, not AI dispatch.
provisional_assumptions.rationale: AI doesn't yet learn which tactic card to play. Default selection exercises the M3 shared-card surface. Faction-specific cards (and their M7 hooks) are tested directly in t2-t6.
provisional_assumptions.follow_up: Add AI tactic-card selection learning the disposition table (mc_v17 ACTION_REGISTRY's tactic_card param). Probably belongs in a future M8 'AI policy refinement' module.
